items.claim: Abdul Hussein has 15 wins with 14 coming inside the distance.
items.quote: this guy has 15 wins. 14 of them come inside the distance.

items.claim: Cody Gibson has been finished six times in his career and is 38 years old.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's been finished, I believe, six times in his career. He's now 38 years old.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking the fight on short notice.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's also taken this fight on short notice as well.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has fought good competition like Muhammad Mokaev and Tyson Nam.
items.quote: He's fought Muhammad Makaya. He's fought Tyson Dam, you know, guys that have been in the UFC.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has tons of power on the feet, good wrestling, good grappling, and decent cardio.
items.quote: tons of power in the feet, good wrestling, good grappling. The cardio ain't half bad.

items.claim: Cody Gibson slows down as he gets older and can make mistakes in the grappling.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's a guy that as he's getting old, he can slow down. He can make mistakes in the grappling.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's chin is in question after getting sparked by Long.
items.quote: The chin could be in question at this point after getting sparked by Long.

items.claim: Axel Sola went to war with Mason Jones, got hurt, and fought through it to reach the final bell.
items.quote: he went to absolute war with Mason Jones, got hurt, was able to fight through it, battle through it, you know, reach the final bell.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim quit against Nazim Sadykhov and Chris Padilla when facing adversity.
items.quote: He quit against Nazim Satakov, you know, on a cut that was not even near his eye... He straight up quit against Chris Padilla.

items.claim: Axel Sola is much bigger and much tougher than Ismael Bonfim.
items.quote: Axel Solo is going to be much much bigger, much tougher.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim has six losses, all coming inside the distance, including four by submission and two by knockout.
items.quote: Bonfam has six losses. All six of them come inside the distance. He has five. He has four submission losses, two by knockout.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio is 39 years old and approaching the washed category.
items.quote: Pontanibio who's 39 years old who is is just approaching the WA or he's he's been approached the washed category.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio's chin is dust after getting dropped or knocked out by multiple fighters.
items.quote: this guy's chin I think is dust. He's getting dropped by Carlson Harris. He's getting dropped by Alex Morono. He's getting you know knocked out by Kevin Holland.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has a ton of power, demonstrated by first-round finishes over Danny Barlow and Trey Waters.
items.quote: Sam Patterson who has a ton of power. I mean, look at what Patterson did to Danny Barlo. Look at what Patterson did to Trey Waters both in round one.
